commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Manual review is needed because this external security-boundary PR has a blocking wrong-layer finding and mock-only proof.; Needs attention: the diff changes sandbox security-boundary behavior but does not run on the rw sandbox mount path that produces the reported bypass.; Review finding: [P1] Create skill dirs before rw sandbox mount resolution — src/agents/workspace.ts:878-879 (sha=b68958c7e6062980677dbb6c94ce88dced039c4b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds creation of `skills` and `.agents/skills` directories in `ensureAgentWorkspace()` so read-only sandbox skill mount sources can exist before container launch.

PR surface: Source +7. Total +7 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the rw sandbox setup path creates only the workspace root before mount resolution, and the resolver filters missing skill directories out of the read-only overlay list. I did not run Docker in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because this external security-boundary PR has a blocking wrong-layer finding and mock-only proof.
